description_html:
﻿ “God can slay the giants in your life!” Is that REALLY the moral of the story when it comes to the infamous historical account of David and Goliath? Get ready as Frank peels back the curtain and reveals the hidden meaning behind the Bible’s most famous showdown in 1 Samuel 17. Tune is as […]

The post God the Artist: What You Never Knew About David & Goliath appeared first on CrossExamined.
